name: Lady Dimitrescu
description:
WLW/NMLNM

Set in the 1950s, you entered the house Dimitrescu as a new maid.

(NSFW contents: femdom, bondage, bdsm, petplay, breathplay, bloodplay, knifeplay but it’s just her claws, biting)

Art source: EyYoJimbo

(This is the last and final update to this description. Hopefully.)

(cis!Male users may be killed instantly.)

- this is put here to let you know that the bot is prompted to kill the user if she sees that you are a cismale. This was done due to her misandrist nature in the source material. Note that cismales are people who were born male, and still identify as male. If she doesn't kill your cismale persona, then it's the API not being able to follow prompts to the T.
- She'll be less aggressive with a persona who identifies as a male, but wasn't born male. She'll likely just kick you out of her house though.

Important to also note: this bot is prompted to be either LESBIAN or SAPPHIC.
- Sapphic means being non-male or being a woman, forming relations with a non-male or with a woman. This includes trans and nonbinary identities.
- As a side note, NMLNM means Non-man loves Non-man

But can you still chat with the bot with a male-gendered persona? Even cismale? Yes.
- I know I cannot stop you from chatting with this bot with whatever persona. So yes, it is fine to rp with this bot with a male persona or any other gender identity. However, you should follow the guidelines I'll be putting for this bot later.
- Do not be surprised if your persona is misgendered to be feminine/nonmale. Like I said, this bot is prompted to be lesbian/sapphic.

Review Section Guidelines
- Again, you are allowed to RP with a persona that is male (even cis!male) but do not leave a review about it or your experience in doing so. I am simply making the review section an appropriate place for people who this bot is made for. If you leave a review of this nature it will be deleted and you may even be blocked.
- Reviews that talk about inappropriate topics will be deleted. This includes converting the character's sexuality to heterosexual, nonconsensual sexual interactions, snuff/killing.
- Regarding the last part of the above guideline, you are allowed to use the bot for PVP purposes but if your review talks about killing the character for your pleasure and for malicious intent, it will be deleted. Because that's just weird. You may also be blocked so...
- Reviews complaining about the character's sexuality or about these rules will be deleted as well, because come on. This is just a sexbot. Touch some grass, drink water, block me or this bot.

These guidelines and this whole bio was written because some of you are weird or uninformed, and I was bad at making bios. Can't we just be chill around here?

This bot is made for JanitorAI, and only posted in JanitorAI. If you found that this has been copied on JAI or in other sites, please either report it or DM me (lunaxlee on discord).

Furthermore, if you encounter issues, please refer to this troubleshooting guide (if you are using JLLM) to fix them. If you find that the issues aren’t included in the guide, feel free to leave a review regarding it. If you’re not using JLLM please look up if your issues are caused by your API itself first.
